name: [Lorebook + Update] Immortal Ascension Chronicles - ⚡ Xianxia Cultivation RPG ⚡
description:
"Defy Heaven. Transcend Mortality. Forge Your Legend."

Step into the Vast Expanse - an infinite universe where mortals can shatter the chains of fate through cultivation. Start as a nobody at the legendary Grand Recruitment Hall and rise through 10 major cultivation realms, from humble Mortal to Transcendent.

🔥 Choose Your Path:

- Join a Great Sect and climb their hierarchy

- Walk the dangerous road of a Rogue Cultivator

- Awaken hidden bloodlines and mysterious constitutions

- Master Spiritual, Body, AND Mental cultivation simultaneously

⚔️ Epic Progression System:

- Each realm grants 10x power increase

- Cross-stage enhancement through multi-path cultivation

- Severing emotions/elements for Dao powers at higher realms

- Transcend three aspects (Body/Soul/Cultivation) to escape the universe itself

🌍 Massive World Scale:

- 16 continents per planet, countless planets per universe

- Domain wars, sect politics, and cosmic-level conflicts

- Rise from foot soldier to universe-transcending cultivator

- LitRPG mechanics with clear power scaling

Cultivation System:

The Vast Expanse - An infinite universe where mortals transcend through cultivation across distinct Steps, with each Step representing a chasm-like difference in power.

Cultivation Realms by Step:

First Step: Spirit Realm

- Qi Condensation (9 Layers)

- Foundation Establishment (Early, Mid, Late, Great Circle)

- Core Formation (Early, Mid, Late, Great Circle)

- Nascent Soul (Early, Mid, Late, Great Circle)

- Spirit Severing (First, Second, Third Severing; if failed to Dao Seeking)

- Dao Seeking (Early, Mid, Late, Great Circle)

- Half-step to True Immortal

Second Step: Grasp the Power of Laws

- True Immortal Realm (Early, Mid, Late, Great Circle)

- Special Stages: Immortal Emperor → Allheaven Immortal → Allheaven Dao Immortal

- Ancient Realm (Early, Mid, Late, Great Circle)

Third Step: Dao Mastery

- Dao Realm (Essence-based progression):

- 1 Essence: Normal Dao Realm

- 2 Essences: Dao Lord

- 3 Essences: Early Dao Sovereign

- 4-6 Essences: True Dao Sovereign

- 7-9 Essences: Paragon

-Partial Transcendent (Transcendent only in one or two aspect)

Fourth Step: Transcendent

- Dao Source Realm (All-powerful)

Fifth Step: Ancestral Origin

- Ancestor Realm (Hallmark: Starry skies manifest within the body)

Progression Features:

- 10x power increase per realm breakthrough

- Cross-stage enhancement through multi-path cultivation

- Emotion/element severing unlocks Dao powers at higher realms

- Ultimate goal: Transcend three aspects (Body/Soul/Cultivation) to escape the universe

Will you remain mortal forever, or will you climb the heavenly ladder to stand among the immortals?

The trials await. Your destiny is unwritten.
